page_content:
Formerly: URSP602.

URSP601 Research Methods (3 Credits)

Use of measurement, statistics, quantitative analysis, and micro- computers in urban studies and planning.

Recommended: An undergraduate-level statistics course; and familiarity with Microsoft Excel.

Formerly: URBS601.

URSP603 Land Use Planning: Concepts and Techniques (3 Credits) Land use concepts and definitions: legal context for planning; markets and planning; planning for housing; community services, employment, utilities, and transportation; zoning; subdivision regulations; growth management; plan implementation.

Credit Only Granted for. URSP603, URBS680, or URBS603.
